_defaults.dressCode: Modest traditional dress recommended. Follow temple-specific rules at the entrance.
_defaults.photography: Usually restricted inside sanctum areas. Check local signage before taking photos.

temples.name: Shree Jagannath Temple, Puri
temples.description: One of India's most important Vaishnavite temples and the center of the annual Rath Yatra at Puri.

temples.name: Lingaraj Temple
temples.description: A major Shiva temple in Bhubaneswar and one of the best-known examples of Kalinga temple architecture.

temples.name: Konark Sun Temple
temples.description: A monumental Sun temple at Konark and a UNESCO World Heritage Site, famous for its chariot-like temple form.

temples.name: Mukteswar Temple
temples.description: A celebrated Shiva temple in Bhubaneswar, described by Odisha Tourism as a gem of Odia temple architecture.

temples.name: Rajarani Temple
temples.description: An 11th-century temple in Bhubaneswar known for red-yellow Rajarania sandstone and Odisha temple architecture.

temples.name: Tara Tarini Temple
temples.location: Purnagiri Hills, near Purushottampur, Ganjam District, Odisha
temples.description: A revered twin-goddess shrine on Purnagiri Hills, listed by Odisha Tourism as one of the country's Adi Shakti Pithas.

temples.name: Biraja Temple
temples.description: A historic Shakti shrine at Jajpur, the ancient Biraja Kshetra, highlighted by Odisha Tourism.

temples.name: Samaleswari Temple
temples.description: A major western Odisha shrine dedicated to Goddess Samaleswari, listed by Odisha Tourism among temples and monuments.
